assignments.title: demo 1.1
assignments.instruction:
Titel van demo 1.1

Typ hier de opdrachten voor studenten.

files.initialCode:
from turtle import *

speed(7)
shape("turtle")
colors = ['red', 'purple', 'blue', 'green', 'orange', 'pink']

for x in range(300):
  pencolor(colors[x%6])
  width(x/100 + 1)
  forward(x)
  left(59)
